name: Warp Zone
description: Dimensional warp transitions with swirling motion

prompts.SessionStart: warping pitch-bend chiptune ascending with dimensional sweep, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: pitch-bend chiptune descending with smooth dimensional closing, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: satisfying warp chiptune chime with bright dimensional ring, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick pitch-bend chiptune tick with crisp warp click, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short warp chiptune chirp confirming with bright bend ping, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two pitch-bend chiptune tones with questioning warp rise, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady warping chiptune pulse with clear dimensional rhythm, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: warp chiptune splitting into two diverging dimensional tones, 8-bit warp sound, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear warp chiptune ping returning with bright dimensional ring, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright warping chiptune burst with energetic pitch-bend attack, 8-bit warp tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
